rationale: In the citing paper, Hsee et al. (2015) is cited at a specific methodological point, not just in a background list. The authors directly adopt the cited paper's six-item reason-versus-feelings decision-style scale in Study 2, report reliability, and use it to test an alternative process account. Although lay rationalism is not the focal theory of the citing paper, this citation has a clear functional role in measurement and interpretation, so it is substantive.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Hsee et al. (2015) as the source of a decision-style measure (reason vs feelings weighting) in Study 2. This borrowed measure is used to check and rule out a competing explanation for the paper's scope-sensitivity effects.
